hero.title: Safeguarding is a priority mission of the parish
hero.lede: Parish safeguarding contacts, diocesan reporting details, and linked safeguarding documents kept together in one clear place.

intro.title: Local and diocesan points of contact
intro.body: Safeguarding contacts can be updated here without touching the page layout. The parish representatives, diocesan team, and related documents are all pulled from the shared parish settings.
